summary: All five requirements are substantially implemented. REQ-1 backend model and CRUD functions are present. REQ-2 hooks are added to useQueries.ts. REQ-3 Advertisements page exists with cards, dialog, EmptyState, and maroon-gold theme. REQ-4 Header and App.tsx wiring are complete. REQ-5 Home page preview section with active ads and View All navigation is present. One minor naming discrepancy exists: the spec calls for 'useGetAds' but the implementation exports 'useGetAllAds'. Overall compliance is very high.

missing_requirements.requirement: useGetAds hook (named exactly 'useGetAds') fetches all ads from the backend actor
missing_requirements.reason: The hook is implemented as 'useGetAllAds' rather than 'useGetAds' as specified. While functionally equivalent, the AC specifies the hook name 'useGetAds'.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle schema migration from old actor state to new actor state including the ads map and nextAdId field.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any migration module or data migration strategy. The requirement only asks for adding the Ad model and CRUD functions to the main actor.

hallucinated_features.description: A URL parameter utility module (frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts) was added with functions for reading/storing URL and session parameters, including logic for clearing sensitive params from URL hash.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request makes no mention of URL parameter utilities, session storage helpers, or hash-based routing parameter management.

hallucinated_features.description: The Advertisements page renders ALL ads including inactive ones with toggle controls, not just active ads as banner cards.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 AC states 'Advertisements page renders a list of active ad banner cards', but the implementation shows inactive ads with reduced opacity and includes toggle buttons, going beyond the stated requirement.
